channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Voici le Google Pixel 11 Pro : aidez-nous à trouver des nouveautés
item.description: Après le Google Pixel 11, c'est au tour du Pixel 11 Pro de faire l'objet d'une fuite. On découvre un design incroyablement proche du Pixel 10 Pro. Tellement proche que l'on ne distingue pas vraiment de nouveautés.

item.title: « Anomalie en orbite » : Starlink a perdu contact avec un satellite
item.description: SpaceX reconnait avoir perdu le contact avec un satellite. À la suite d'une « anomalie en orbite », le satellite Starlink 34343 a cessé de répondre alors qu'il évoluait à environ 560 km d’altitude.

item.title: ‘Pizza Movie’ Has a Hilariously Grisly New Way to Say ‘This Is Your Brain on Drugs’ (Exclusive)
item.description: Watch a NSFW clip from the new Hulu sci-fi horror comedy starring Gaten Matarazzo and Sean Giambrone.

item.title: Razer’s first split ergonomic keyboard puts extra keys in reach of your thumbs
item.description: Razer has announced its first keyboard with a split and curved ergonomic layout. The new Pro Type Ergo is available starting today, which at $189.99 is slightly more expensive than the more traditional $159.99 Pro Type Ultra that launched in 2021. Like its predecessor, Razer's new Pro Type Ergo is being positioned as a productivity […]

item.title: Like it or not, AI is part of art school curriculums
item.description: When my baby brother, a 3D modelling and animation student, talks to me about his projects and studies, the pride I usually feel is becoming increasingly tainted by a growing sense of dread. As a creative professional and former design student myself, I understand all too well how fierce the competition for postgraduate jobs will […]

item.title: Nomadic raises $8.4 million to wrangle the data pouring off autonomous vehicles
item.description: The company turns turns footage from robots into structured, searchable datasets with a deep learning model.

item.title: Claude Code's source code appears to have leaked: here's what we know
item.description: Anthropic appears to have accidentally revealed the inner workings of one of its most popular and lucrative AI products, the agentic AI harness Claude Code, to the public.A 59.8 MB JavaScript source map file (.map), intended for internal debugging, was inadvertently included in version 2.1.88 of the @anthropic-ai/claude-code package on the public npm registry pushed live earlier this morning. By 4:23 am ET, Chaofan Shou (@Fried_rice), an intern at Solayer Labs, broadcasted the discovery on X (formerly Twitter). The post, which included a direct download link to a hosted archive, acted as a dig...

item.title: Bascule audio sur iOS : vos casques et écouteurs (Sony, Bose, JBL, etc.) devraient bientôt en profiter
item.description: En Europe, Apple teste la possibilité pour des écouteurs ou un casque d'autres marques que la sienne de gérer le changement de source sonore. On vous explique tout.

item.title: Health data giant CareCloud says hackers accessed patients’ medical records
item.description: CareCloud, a major provider of medical records storage, said hackers accessed one of its repositories of patient data earlier in March. It provides technnology for more than 45,000 providers covering millions of patients.

item.title: César Chavez supporters face the painful question of what to do with the labor leader’s legacy
item.description: Chavez’s fall from grace is an example of why movements shouldn’t be tied to a single leader. Antonio Bustamante has kept a watercolor of labor leader César Chavez for more than 35 years, hanging it on the wall of his law office in Yuma, Arizona. As a young man, he was moved by Chavez and helped organize workers before joining his security team.Like many others, Bustamante must now wrestle with reconciling the man he adored with the allegations Chavez groomed and sexually abused women and young girls.“I’m trying to figure out how emotionally and intellectually I’ll be able to understand my pe...

item.title: TV Samsung 2026 : prix et caractéristiques des gammes Mini LED et Neo QLED
item.description: Samsung étoffe sa gamme de téléviseurs LCD pour 2026 avec quatre nouvelles séries Mini LED et Neo QLED. Des M70H et M80H aux QN70H et QN80H, le constructeur coréen propose une offre à partir de 499 euros, pensée pour tous les budgets et tous les usages.

item.title: Meta agrees to ‘reduce’ Instagram’s PG-13 rating references
item.description: Meta has reached an agreement with the Motion Picture Association (MPA) that will require the platform to "substantially reduce" its reference to the PG-13 rating when describing Instagram's teen accounts. In a press release on Tuesday, a Meta spokesperson says its 13+ content guidelines aren't changing, but it has "taken the MPA's feedback on how […]...

item.title: Rivian spinoff Also will build autonomous delivery vehicles for DoorDash
item.description: DoorDash joins Greenoaks Capital in another $200 million funding round for Also, bringing its total funding to more than $500 million.

item.title: In a Big Reversal, Zohran Mamdani Tells NYC Agencies to Use TikTok
item.description: The city will allow agencies to return to TikTok, but with strict new device and security rules.

item.title: Imagine if your Teams or Slack messages automatically turned into secure context for your AI agents — PromptQL built it
item.description: For the modern enterprise, the digital workspace risks descending into "coordination theater," in which teams spend more time discussing work than executing it. While traditional tools like Slack or Teams excel at rapid communication, they have structurally failed to serve as a reliable foundation for AI agents, such that a Hacker News thread went viral in February 2026 calling upon OpenAI to build its own version of Slack to help empower AI agents, amassing 327 comments. That's because agents often lack the real-time context and secure data access required to be truly useful, often resulting ...

item.title: Le Google Pixel 10 devient une superbe affaire dans ce pack à -35 % avec une JBL Flip 7 offerte
item.description: Le Google Pixel 10 est rejoint par la JBL Flip 7 dans un pack que Darty vend à un prix cassé puisqu'il passe de 1 048 euros à 679 euros, soit une remise de presque 400 euros.

item.title: Roku launches a standalone app for Howdy, its $2.99 streaming service
item.description: With this new app, Roku says subscribers can access Howdy's library of content on the go.

item.title: All Google users in the US can now change their Gmail address
item.description: As of April 1, Gmail will have been around for 22 years. Many of us have a poorly chosen email address that's laced with regret, but we're now stuck with it. We've perhaps had it for longer than most college students have been alive and that's how others get in touch with us. Google is now giving us a chance to move on and change our Gmail address to something more appropriate.All users in the US can now change their Google Account username — the bit before the @ in your Gmail address. Google said in December that it was gradually rolling out this option to all users.To change your Google Acco...

item.title: Meta launches two new Ray-Ban glasses designed for prescription wearers
item.description: Meta says these glasses are the most comfortable ones it has ever designed, as they're made for all-day comfort.

item.title: Meta’s Two New Smart Glasses Are Slimmer and More Like Regular Glasses
item.description: New models have prescriptions in mind for people who actually still need help seeing.

item.title: OkCupid settles claims it shared user photos with a facial recognition company
item.description: Dating app OkCupid agreed to settle claims from the Federal Trade Commission that it deceived millions of users by sharing their photos with a third-party facial recognition company without their consent. OkCupid and parent company Match Group did not admit wrongdoing as part of the settlement, but instead promised not to make similar alleged misrepresentations […]...

item.title: Applications météo : notre sélection des applications gratuites les plus fiables
item.description: Marre de vous laisser surprendre par la pluie ou la chaleur écrasante en sortant de chez vous ? Avec notre sélection des meilleures applications de météo sur Android et iPhone, vous pourrez retrouver facilement les prévisions sur plusieurs jours, les précipitations et plus encore. Pratique aussi en temps de canicule.

item.title: Fitness trackers are the highlight of Amazons Big Spring Sale closing day — save $100 on Apple and Garmin
item.description: Fitness tracker deals are holding strong in the Amazon Big Spring Sale. Save $100 on the Apple Watch Series 11 or $105 on Garmin running watches.

item.title: « Ils menacent la vie privée des Américains » : les robots humanoïdes chinois, nouveau cauchemar des États-Unis
item.description: Un nouveau projet de loi bipartisan américain prévoit d'interdire formellement au gouvernement fédéral l'achat et l'utilisation de robots terrestres chinois. Cette offensive législative vise à contrer les risques d'espionnage tout en protégeant l'industrie robotique nationale face à une concurrence de plus en plus agressive.

item.title: Instagram tests letting you pay to view stories anonymously
item.description: Meta is testing an Instagram subscription that offers a bunch of new perks, such as the ability to view stories without the poster knowing, according to a report from TechCrunch. The paid plan will also allow subscribers to see how many times people replay their own stories and search for specific viewers. Other features include […]

item.title: Elizabeth Olsen Promises She Knows Nothing About Her Marvel Future
item.description: Plus, Christopher Eccleston's latest demand for returning to 'Doctor Who'.

item.title: Aston Martin Valhalla (2026) Review: A $1 Million Plug-In Hybrid
item.description: A robot could apparently drive this million-dollar supercar faster than a fleshy human, but the unbelievable experience would be entirely lost on it.

item.title: The company behind ClassPass and Mindbody just got a lot bigger with a $7.5B merger
item.description: The merger is a sign that the fitness industry is continuing to move toward consolidation to compete at a larger scale. Recent moves include MyFitnessPal acquiring Cal AI, an AI calorie counting app, and Strava buying two apps: cycling app The Breakaway and running app Runna.

item.title: Exclusive: Runway launches $10M fund, Builders program to support early stage AI startups
item.description: Runway is launching a $10 million fund and startup program to back companies building with its AI video models, as it pushes toward interactive, real-time “video intelligence” applications.

item.title: Woman allegedly called ICE on workers she hired
item.description: A viral video shows federal agents waiting outside a Maryland home as workers claim the woman reported them—an allegation she denies. A woman is facing backlash after allegedly calling ICE on construction workers who were finishing up a roofing job at her home in Cambridge, Maryland. In a video, recorded and livestreamed on Facebook by Bryan Polanco, a co-worker with permanent residency, from the roof of the property, federal agents can be seen waiting on the lawn for the workers. ...

item.title: Apple at 50: the good and the bad
item.description: We're spending the week documenting and analyzing the first half-century of Apple's existence, from the oft-overlooked creation of QuickTime to the iconic MacBook Air to Apple's veering into antitrust territory. We're also ranking the best Apple products of all time, and it's causing us all to feel many feelings. On this episode of The Vergecast, […]...

item.title: Our favorite Nothing smartwatch is $69 on final day of Amazons Spring Sale — record price
item.description: The Nothing Watch 3 Pro is on sale for Amazon's Big Spring Sale for a record-low price of $69. That's a 30% discount on a Mashable Choice winner.

item.title: Prise en main | Les AirPods Max 2 et le son du silence
item.description: Il y a des oreilles chez Bose et Sony qui doivent siler. Apple a revu ses AirPods Max 2 et solidifie ses forces, au lieu de corriger ses faiblesses. Le résultat est un casque avec ou sans fil extrêmement séduisant, en raison de ses prouesses techniques, mais aussi très exclusif, en raison d’un prix de vente exorbitant.

item.title: GMKtec devance Asus avec le premier PC équipé d’un Core Ultra X7 358H, de quoi affronter le Mac mini M4 Pro
item.description: Le premier mini PC sous architecture Intel Core Ultra 300 arrive ce soir. Sur le papier, le GMKtec Evo-T2 coche toutes les cases : 64 Go de RAM, IA à tous les étages et réseau 10 Gbit/s. Le problème ? Son prix flirte avec celui d'un Mac mini bien équipé.

item.title: As the Iran war drags on, are Trump’s tactics to regulate markets working?
item.description: Jeffrey Sonnenfeld, a professor at the Yale University School of Management, says Trump’s mixed messaging is starting to backfire. As the Iran war intensifies, President Donald Trump has prioritized efforts to calm the financial markets — trying to keep oil prices from exploding upward, stocks from cratering and interest rates from surging.When the markets have flashed danger, Trump has been quick with a social media post or a remark to claim the war he launched last month could soon end. He’s publicly declared that the markets are doing better than he expected, even with the S&P 500 stock ind...

item.title: Amazon Big Spring Sale ends today: Grab the new iPad Air and other tablets while you still can
item.description: Save on the new Apple iPad Air M4, Android tablets, and more before the event ends today, March 31.

item.title: What happened to Allbirds?
item.description: Once valued at $4 billion, the brand known for its comfortable footwear just sold itself for a fraction of that. Here’s what investors can expect. AllBirds Inc. was valued at $4 billion less than five years ago. Now, it will be sold for just $39 million.

item.title: The Broken System That Keeps Shipping Crews Stranded in the Strait of Hormuz
item.description: Vessels are increasingly being abandoned during the war on Iran, revealing a hidden failure in the global systems that keep goods—and people—moving.

item.title: NASA Rover Finds Glowing, Ruby-Like Crystals on Mars for the First Time
item.description: The tiny grains are embedded inside pebbles found outside the rim of Jezero Crater.

item.title: Le forfait mobile de Free repasse à 9,99 euros : c’est le bon moment pour faire baisser la facture mensuelle
item.description: Le prix de la Série Free a tendance à fluctuer au fil des semaines. Actuellement positionnée à moins de 10 euros pour une généreuse enveloppe de 150 Go, l'offre retrouve un très bon équilibre et se présente comme une option particulièrement pertinente.

item.title: You can finally replace your embarrassing Gmail username
item.description: If you've been stuck with a regrettable Gmail username you picked years ago, you might finally have a way out. Starting Tuesday, Gmail users in the US can change the portion of their email address before "@gmail.com," as reported by Android Authority. After changing your Gmail username, your old email address will remain connected to […]

item.title: Quel est le meilleur forfait mobile pour voyager dans le monde en 2026 ?
item.description: Partir en voyage sans exploser sa facture de téléphone, c'est désormais possible. Les forfaits mobiles internationaux se multiplient avec des tarifs de 15,99 à 44,99 euros et des couvertures de 110 à 130 destinations. On a comparé Sosh, Free, Bouygues, RED et Orange. On vous parle aussi des offres eSIM internationales.

item.title: Samsung dévoile les tarifs de ses téléviseurs OLED et Micro RGB pour 2026.
item.description: Les prix des séries S85H, S92H (ou S90H), S95H, S99H, R85H et R95H viennent d'être communiqués, avec des modèles adaptés à diverses tailles d'écran. En voici tous les détails.

item.title: Waymo starts robotaxi services at San Antonio International Airport
item.description: It's the fourth airport Waymo is serving, adding to Phoenix Sky Harbor, San Francisco, and San Jose International airports.

item.title: Google researchers just put a new expiration date on Bitcoin
item.description: A team of Google researchers has found new ways to break commonly used cryptography with quantum computers, and this includes crypto used by Bitcoin.

item.title: Android 17 : le dossier ultime pour tout savoir sur la future mise à jour de vos smartphones et tablettes
item.description: Les chantiers d'Android 17 ont été officiellement lancés par Google. Voici les nouveautés, les dates importantes et les smartphones compatibles avec la mise à jour encore en bêta.

item.title: Speechify’s Windows app uses local models for transcription and dictation
item.description: Speechify just launched a native Windows app that employs locally stored models to enable dictation and transcription across apps.

item.title: T-Mobile is giving away the Apple iPhone 17 for free — last chance to claim yours
item.description: How to get free iPhone. Get the Apple iPhone 17 for free or the iPhone 17 Pro for under $100 from T-Mobile with no trade-in required when switching to an Experience Beyond plan
